data.description:
### 2. Incident Overview

* **Scenario Type:** User-Flagged Behavior (CI failure)

#### Expected Behavior

`tests/scripts/test-poetry-graceful-degradation.sh` should complete within the 90-second per-test timeout in CI, as it does locally (0.75s wall time).

#### Actual Behavior

On PR #15 CI run 25124769315, this test reported `TIMEOUT (exceeded 90s)`. The captured "Failed test output" shows the test starting all 8 subtests' echo lines but no `PASSED:` summary — consistent with a hang, not a real assertion failure. Locally the test passes in 0.75 seconds.

The test invokes:
- plugins/dso/scripts/classify-task.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/issue-batch.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/ensure-pre-commit.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/reinstall-hooks.sh

with PATH stubbed to remove poetry. One of these scripts likely hangs in CI environment (possibly waiting on stdin, network, or lock contention) but completes immediately locally.

#### Files involved

- tests/scripts/test-poetry-graceful-degradation.sh
- plugins/dso/scripts/classify-task.sh (and others as listed)

#### Triage actions taken

- Re-ran the failed job (CI run 25124769315) to check for flakiness
- Local runtime: 0.22s user, 0.27s system, 0.75s wall — 120x faster than CI timeout
data.title: [CI Script Tests]: test-poetry-graceful-degradation.sh -> TIMEOUT (exceeded 90s) on PR #15
